name: Jiangyin Haida Rubber And Plastic Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangyin Haida Rubber and Plastic Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and sale of rubber and plastic materials in China and internationally. It offers solutions for sealing and vibration damping systems for use in rail transit, construction, automobile, and shipping applications. The company offers its products under the Haida brand. Jiangyin Haida Rubber and Plastic Co., Ltd. is based in Jiangyin, China.
